marketEvidence.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
marketEvidence.resolutionRules: Resolves YES if Rihanna officially releases a new album before GTA VI is officially released in the US.

steps.title: 任务拆解 / Plan task

modelAction.summary: Select plan_task as the next bounded ColdRead tool.

steps.observation: GLM-5.1 制定 6 步审计计划。

steps.title: 读取真实盘口 / Fetch live market

modelAction.summary: Select fetch_polymarket_market as the next bounded ColdRead tool.

steps.observation: 找到真实 Polymarket 市场并保留来源链接。

steps.title: 生成轨迹草稿 / Draft trace

modelAction.summary: Select draft_agent_trace as the next bounded ColdRead tool.

steps.observation: GLM-5.1 生成第一版 Agent Run Trace。

steps.title: 轨迹校验失败 / Trace validation failed

modelAction.summary: Select validate_agent_trace as the next bounded ColdRead tool.

steps.observation: trace 缺少 externalRiskFlags，工具拒绝进入审计载荷。

steps.title: 自我修复 / Self repair

modelAction.summary: Select repair_agent_trace as the next bounded ColdRead tool.

steps.observation: GLM-5.1 补齐风险字段，并将建议降级为 HOLD。

steps.title: 计算哈希并准备锚点 / Compute hash and prepare anchor

modelAction.summary: Select prepare_sepolia_anchor as the next bounded ColdRead tool.

steps.observation: 已计算 trace hash 并准备 Sepolia calldata anchor。

task.objective: Analyze a live Polymarket market and draft an auditable lens decision.

steps.title: Normalize live market evidence
steps.observation: The agent loads a live Polymarket market, records the question, outcomes, prices, status, volume, liquidity, and resolution text.

steps.title: Estimate market structure
steps.observation: YES is expensive relative to NO, so the market already prices in a strong consensus.
riskChecks: Avoid paying a high consensus price without an independent catalyst.

steps.title: Search for missing context
steps.observation: The trace marks that live external news confirmation is required before any buy recommendation can become executable.
riskChecks: Do not infer the real-world event state from prediction market price alone.

steps.title: Run veto checks
steps.observation: The agent refuses execution because source diversity is still incomplete for a real-money order.
riskChecks: Block wallet execution until independent confirmation is attached.

steps.title: Self-correct draft action
steps.observation: The initial buy-leaning draft is corrected to HOLD because the evidence chain is not strong enough for autonomous execution.
selfCorrections: Downgrade BUY_YES_SMALL to HOLD when the only strong signal is market price.

steps.title: Prepare audit material
steps.observation: The trace keeps every decision claim tied to evidence references so the final dossier can be anchored later.
riskChecks: Require user approval before wallet execution.

finalLensDraft.rationale: The market is live and analyzable, but ColdRead should not execute from market price alone. The auditable recommendation is HOLD until external confirmation is attached.
externalRiskFlags: Needs external news confirmation before buy.
Wallet execution requires explicit user approval.
Audit anchor should record the final dossier before any production run.
